00154| function updateCarbonFootprint(data) {
00155|     // Calculate emissions (0.92 lbs CO2 per kWh = 0.417 kg CO2 per kWh)
00156|     let totalPower = 0;
00157|     data.forEach(record => {
00158|         totalPower += record.power_watts;
00159|     });
00160|     
00161|     const avgPowerKW = totalPower / data.length / 1000;
00162|     const currentDay = new Date().getDate();
00163|     const daysInMonth = 30;
00164|     
00165|     const usageTillNow = avgPowerKW * currentDay * 24;
00166|     const usagePredicted = avgPowerKW * daysInMonth * 24;
00167|     
00168|     const emissionTillDate = usageTillNow * 0.417;
00169|     const emissionPredicted = usagePredicted * 0.417;
00170|     
00171|     document.getElementById('emissionTillDate').textContent = `${emissionTillDate.toFixed(1)} Kg of CO2`;
00172|     document.getElementById('emissionPredicted').textContent = `${emissionPredicted.toFixed(1)} Kg of CO2`;
00173|     
00174|     // Green energy (simulate 30% of usage)
00175|     const greenEnergy = usageTillNow * 0.3;
00176|     const greenGoal = 500;
00177|     const greenPercent = Math.min((greenEnergy / greenGoal) * 100, 100);
00178|     
00179|     document.getElementById('greenCurrent').textContent = `${greenEnergy.toFixed(0)} kWh`;
00180|     document.getElementById('greenProgress').style.width = `${greenPercent}%`;
00181| }
00182|
